events.text: I’ll inspect the gas monitor image, read the four displayed channels, then write the required JSON to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The screen shows O2 20.5%, LEL 0%, H2S 1 ppm, and CO 3 ppm. Those are within normal confined-space entry thresholds, so I’m recording this as acceptable pending the rest of the permit controls.
